theme_notes: Touchstones: Venezuela earthquake kills 920+ with rescue window closing; Iran drone attack on Bahrain escalating Gulf tensions; FIFA World Cup 2026 (France 4-1 Norway, Dembélé hat trick before halftime); Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce's reported July 3rd wedding; Rubio's Israel-Lebanon framework deal.
settled: Square. Like the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire — looks great, give it a week.
Zero balance. Dembélé scored a hat trick today. You finally scored too.
Settled. Taylor Swift has more unresolved drama at her own wedding. Congrats.
youOwe: You owe less than a World Cup stadium hot dog. Somehow this is worse.
Dembélé scored a hat trick before halftime. You can't cover one tab.
Taylor Swift blows more on a single candle. You're worse with money than Taylor Swift.
A World Cup nosebleed ticket costs more. You're stuck in the debt group stage.
Venezuela's earthquake measured 7.8. This debt is barely a 2. Still felt it.
Iran launched four drones at Bahrain today. You launched one excuse. Still airborne.
France beat Norway 4-1. You're losing 1-0 to basic financial responsibility.
Not quite a World Cup ticket. Not quite a functioning adult. Welcome to both clubs.
That's asylum application territory. Good news: you might need the option soon.
Taylor Swift is changing three dresses at her own wedding. You haven't changed once.
The Venezuela earthquake rescue window closes in 72 hours. Yours closed months ago.
The Supreme Court ruled 6-3 today. Your partner rules on this debt 1-0. Unanimous.
Iran struck Bahrain with drones. Your wallet did comparable damage to this relationship.
World Cup hospitality suite territory. You're in the nosebleeds of accountability.
Taylor and Travis get married July 3. Your debt predates their engagement.
920 people lost everything in Venezuela. You lost the plot somewhere around $4,000.
The Middle East got a peace framework today. You need a payment framework, you animal.
The Supreme Court blocked the border. Your partner should block everything you own.
theyOwe: They owe you almost nothing. Still more than Iran has paid Bahrain. Collect.
Dembélé earns this per kick. Your dignity earns less. Either way, document it.
So small it's almost sweet. It isn't sweet. It's $40.
One World Cup souvenir scarf. They owe you exactly one scarf and one apology.
Less than a Venezuela earthquake donation. Your partner has different priorities.
Taylor Swift's wedding has more transparency than their payment timeline.
Iran launched drones for this kind of budget. Your partner just launched excuses.
Almost a World Cup group stage ticket. Almost accountability. Almost a partner.
The earthquake rescue window is 72 hours. This debt is on day 72. Do the math.
Supreme Court filing money. You have a case. File it.
France scored four today. Your partner has scored zero on repayment.
Taylor Swift changes outfits at the concert AND at the wedding. Your partner changes nothing.
Venezuela earthquake damage runs into the billions. Your partner is doing their small part.
Rubio flew to the Middle East for one deal. You deserve at least a Venmo notification.
Four figures. Taylor writes a song about this in verse four. It goes platinum. You get nothing.
Claim them as a dependent on your taxes. You are clearly carrying them.
Iran owes Bahrain less than this. And Iran attacked Bahrain with drones.
The Supreme Court blocked asylum seekers at the border. Seek asylum from this relationship.
